tool.name: SameStr Stats
tool.description: generates statistics for SameStr variant profiles including coverage and diversity metrics

param.name: input_snvs
param.label: Input SNV profiles
param.help: Single-sample/-genome SNV profile datasets generated SameStr Merge.

param.name: input_names
param.label: Sample identifiers
param.help: Dataset listing the sample/reference genome identifiers one per line.

param.name: database
param.label: SameStr database
param.help: SameStr database built from MetaPhlAn or mOTUS markers

param.label: Report statistics only for dominant variants
param.help: Calculate statistics based on consensus/dominant variants only, ignoring minority variants (default: False).

tool.help:
@SAMESTR_INTRO@
SameStr Stats .............
SameStr Stats generates statistics from filtered SNV profiles to help evaluate data quality before strain comparison. It calculates coverage metrics, nucleotide diversity, and filtering summaries for each sample. These statistics help assess whether the data is suitable for downstream strain comparison.
**Input Requirements**
For each analysis, the following inputs must be provided:
- One or more clade-specific SNV profiles in NPZ/NPY format generated by SameStr filter or SameStr merge. - A list of the samples present in the SNV profile in simple one-sample-per-line format as generated by SameStr filter or merge. - The MetaPhlAn or mOTUS clade marker database that matches the database used to generate the input profiles.
**Parameters**
- Report statistics only for dominant variants: Calculate metrics based on only the most common nucleotide at each position, ignoring minority variants.
**Results and Outputs**
- Alignment statistics: Statistical summary of the clade with per-sample coverage and diversity metrics. Can be used to evaluate input data quality.
